headline: 3 Industrials Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 15.5% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 3.5% return.

headline: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NSC): Israel Englander Is Buying This Stock
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) is featured on the Israel Englander Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks. Although Israel Englander has maintained a long-term interest in Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) for over a decade, this interest has translated into a massive buying spree in recent months.
